thunderbolt.name: Thunderbolt
thunderbolt.description: A strong electric blast that may paralyze the foe.

quick-attack.name: Quick Attack
quick-attack.description: An extremely fast attack that always strikes first.

iron-tail.name: Iron Tail
iron-tail.description: The foe is slammed with a steel-hard tail.

electro-ball.name: Electro Ball
electro-ball.description: Hurls an electric orb. The faster the user, the more damage.

flamethrower.name: Flamethrower
flamethrower.description: A powerful fire attack that may inflict a burn.

air-slash.name: Air Slash
air-slash.description: The user attacks with a blade of air.

dragon-claw.name: Dragon Claw
dragon-claw.description: Sharp, huge claws hook and slash the foe.

fire-punch.name: Fire Punch
fire-punch.description: A fiery punch that may burn the foe.

hydro-pump.name: Hydro Pump
hydro-pump.description: A powerful blast of water under great pressure.

ice-beam.name: Ice Beam
ice-beam.description: An ice-cold beam of energy that may freeze the foe.

bite.name: Bite
bite.description: Bites with vicious fangs. May cause flinching.

water-pulse.name: Water Pulse
water-pulse.description: Attacks with ultrasonic waves. May confuse the foe.

solar-beam.name: Solar Beam
solar-beam.description: A powerful beam of solar energy.

sludge-bomb.name: Sludge Bomb
sludge-bomb.description: Hurls unsanitary sludge at the foe. May poison.

razor-leaf.name: Razor Leaf
razor-leaf.description: Cuts the foe with sharp-edged leaves.

body-slam.name: Body Slam
body-slam.description: A full-body charge that may paralyze the foe.

shadow-ball.name: Shadow Ball
shadow-ball.description: Hurls a shadowy blob at the foe.

dark-pulse.name: Dark Pulse
dark-pulse.description: Releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.description: A powerful quake that hits all adjacent Pokemon.

ice-punch.name: Ice Punch
ice-punch.description: An icy punch that may freeze the foe.

crunch.name: Crunch
crunch.description: Crunches with sharp fangs. May lower Defense.
